name: summarize-archive
description: Condense a long conversation or document into a structured summary and store it in memory for future reference.

content.description: The content to summarize (conversation transcript, document text, etc.)

steps.template:
Summarize the following content for archival under label '{{context_label}}'.
Detail level: {{detail_level}}

Content:
{{content}}

Extract:
- Key decisions made
- Problems identified and solutions applied
- Important context that would be needed to resume this work
- Action items or follow-ups mentioned
- Technical details worth preserving

Format the summary as a structured memory entry:
- Title: {{context_label}}
- Date: [current date]
- Summary: [2-3 sentence overview]
- Key Points: [numbered list]
- Decisions: [what was decided and why]
- Technical Notes: [implementation details, configs, commands]
- Follow-ups: [open items]
- Tags: [relevant keywords for future retrieval]
